nasb.text: Now there was a man at Caesarea named Cornelius, a centurion of what was called the Italian cohort,

esv.text: At Caesarea there was a man named Cornelius, a centurion of what was known as the Italian Cohort,

cnv.text: 在該撒利亞有一個人，名叫哥尼流，是意大利營的百夫長。

ccb.text: 在凯撒利亚有一位隶属意大利营的百夫长名叫哥尼流。

csbs.text: 在凯撒里亚有一个名叫哥尼流的人，是那叫做“意大利”军团的百夫长，
